content.en:
With Ye Tian's methods, let alone the one-eyed violent wolf at the level of the Source King, even if it is a weaker Source Emperor, don't want to find him.

Therefore, Ye Tian went all the way unimpeded, and not a single one-eyed wolf found him at all.

Of course, Ye Tian couldn't move quickly, otherwise if his breath leaked, he would still be exposed.

"The one-eyed wolf territory is not protected by a formation, if there is a formation, I will definitely not be able to penetrate deeply, and it will definitely be exposed!" Ye Tian thought to himself as he walked all the way.

In the one-eyed wolf territory without a formation, Ye Tian was like entering a no-man's land, it was too easy.

In this way, Ye Tian came to the core cave of the one-eyed wolf clan.

Ye Tian had already sensed the aura of various treasures here, all of which were piled up in this cave, and there were only a few Source Emperor caretakers.

There was no formation here, so Ye Tian didn't have to worry about being discovered at all.

"Although the strength of the source beast is strong, it's a pity that there are too few means, and there is no big clan and no formation!"

Ye Tian shook his head, feeling sorry for the source beast.

Of course, fortunately, these one-eyed wolves would not arrange the formation, otherwise it would be impossible for Ye Tian to sneak in.

Ye Tian didn't underestimate the one-eyed wolf, those powerful Source Emperor-level one-eyed wolves were still able to find his whereabouts.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not dare to be too arrogant.

Under the investigation of the Life Heavenly Pupil, he knew very well the location of those powerful Source Emperor-level one-eyed wolves, so he could easily avoid them.

Finally, Ye Tian found a suitable opportunity and dived into the depths of that core cave.

"Tiangang Copperstone, such a large piece, extremely rare!"

"Treasure bamboo, so many roots!"

"Infinite Divine Jade, like a small mountain, oh my God, the One-Eyed Tyrant Wolf Clan has collected such a large piece!"

"Ice Fruits, dozens of them, but it's a pity that the one-eyed wolf is not qualified for storage, and the medicinal effect is estimated to lose thirty percent!"

"Wanlong rock crystal, tengon, green yellow stone ......"

Ye Tian looked at the materials and treasures that were incomparably rare in the outside world, and his heart was extremely excited.

The one-eyed wolf clan may know that these things are treasures, but they don't know how to use them, but Ye Tian knows!

The accumulated value of so many treasures can far exceed the net worth of a Heavenly Venerable, and even comparable to the net worth of a Supreme, or even more than the net worth of a Supreme.

"Close!"

"Close!"

"Close!"

Ye Tian collected these treasures one by one and stored them in the small universe.

Originally, Ye Tian's net worth could be said to have shrunk greatly in order to cultivate the second deity, even if he controlled the wasteland, he couldn't rob his subordinates of their resources, so his own resources were not very rich.

And now, these resource treasures suddenly made Ye Tian's net worth soar.

After a while, Ye Tian collected all these treasures and did not leave them at all.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian moved away, without even a trace of concealment.

And this move naturally aroused the idea of the one-eyed wolf, but it was a pity that those one-eyed wolf couldn't catch up with Ye Tian at all, and they quickly lost it.

And immediately after, a roar of rage came from the One-Eyed Wolf Mountain Range.

Obviously, they had already discovered that their treasures had been stolen by Ye Tian.

-------

In a flash, Ye Tian had already entered the Origin Realm for fifty years.

In the past fifty years, Ye Tian has gained a lot, which is simply more than the sum of the previous ones, because the resources of the Origin Realm are too rich, although it cannot be described as a treasure everywhere, but it is almost the same.

However, Ye Tian was not in a hurry to go out.

With his strength, there is no way to break the barriers of the origin realm and leave the origin realm, but he can completely return to the place he entered, and let the supremes of the outside world break the node and let him leave.

However, in the short term, the supremes of the outside world are busy suppressing and destroying creatures, and they may not be free.

So, there's no need for him to go back now.

According to his speculation, in the last few hundred years, it is estimated that the Supremes may not be free, and the thousand years is the time that Ye Tian has set for himself.

A thousand years later, he returned to the point where he had come in.

this day.

Ye Tian came to a territory and once again used the Life Heavenly Pupil to probe the situation in this area.

Suddenly, Ye Tian found that in a certain area, a large number of source beasts were gathered together, and there were many of them, no less than tens of thousands.

At first, he thought that this was a large race, but after using the talent of time and space to cooperate with the Life Heavenly Pupil to explore the past, he found that this was not a race, but a variety of source beasts gathered together.

Rumble!!!!

Time and space swept away, and Ye Tian's gaze crossed time and space, and saw the situation in that area.

I saw a large number of source beasts gathered together, all staring at one place.

Click!!

Above the mountain peak, the void cracked, and an ancient well slowly emerged.

With the appearance of the ancient well, a trace of aura emanated out, making this group of source beasts crazy, as if they were about to rush into the mountain peak, but the shattered void rippled out wisps of rules, suppressing these source beasts.

Obviously, the ancient well has not completely emerged, and it can't be approached at this time, otherwise it will be killed by the rule town that emanates from the ancient well.

"Well of Origin !!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Originally, he just wanted to investigate the situation, but he didn't expect to find the Well of Origin, and it was a new Well of Origin that had just been bred, and it was also a complete Well of Origin.

Compared to the complete Well of Origin, the broken Well of Origin that he found was simply rubbish!

The most powerful in this area are just a few top-notch Source Emperors, and there are no Source Emperors and Yuan Ancestors. But if the Origin Well is truly born and the breath is completely leaked out, it is estimated that the Source Emperor and Source Ancestor from other places will rush over!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he had a decision in his mind.

Swish!

He quickly moved around, using his fastest speed, and arrived at his destination in three hours.

"Die!"

As soon as Ye Tian came, he made a move!

Rumble!!!!

The Chaos God and Demon Elephant was launched, and the third type of Tiangang Battle Method was blessed, and the hands of the gods and demons crossed a large number of source beasts, killing these source beasts into slag one after another.

At the same time, Ye Tian's super god-level space-time talent used space-time power to directly kill those weaker source beasts to death.

In the blink of an eye, more than ninety percent of the source beasts died, and only a few source beasts at the source emperor level remained.

Ye Tian's move seemed to cause public anger, and those Source Emperor-level Source Beasts rushed towards Ye Tian.

However, these Source Emperors were still too weak, and even Ye Tian's Chaos Origin Ancient Well's defenses could not be broken, coupled with Ye Tian's strength skyrocketing, he could almost be invincible at the Source Emperor level.

In addition, Ye Tian's power is endless, almost inexhaustible.

Gradually, a Source Beast at the Origin Emperor level was killed by Ye Tianbang.

A few hours later, all of the source beasts here died.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry to rest, but hurriedly began to set up a formation to cover the aura here.

Gradually, the large arrays were arranged by Ye Tian, and all kinds of concealment breaths, defenses, killing formations, and space arrays were all arranged by Ye Tian.

"Arrange so many formations to cause a vision that is enough to cover up the birth of the Origin Well, so as not to attract those powerful Source Emperors and Source Ancestors!"

Ye Tian muttered.
